zh.lifeSummary: 當James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston於大約1410年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可時，他的父親Alexander Livingstone of Callendar29歲，母親Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas27歲。他於1434年5月14日與Marion Berwick在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年在蘇格蘭斯林史爾吉爾斯享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston于大约1410年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可时，他的父亲Alexander Livingstone of Callendar29岁，母亲Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas27岁。他于1434年5月14日与Marion Berwick在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年在苏格兰斯林史爾吉爾斯享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston was born about 1410, in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, was 29 and his mother, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, was 27. He married Marion Berwick on 14 May 1434, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1467, in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston est né environ 1410, à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marion Berwick le 14 mai 1434, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1467, à Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Er hat am 14. Mai 1434 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland Marion Berwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: James Livingston 1st Lord Livingstonが約1410年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクで生まれた時，父Alexander Livingstone of Callendarは29歳，母Lady Janet Dauphine Dundasは27歳であった。1434年5月14日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウでMarion Berwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアキルシスで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Livingstone of Callendar(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1434년 5월 14일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 Marion Berwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 킬시스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Livingstone of Callendar, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marion Berwick em 14 de maio de 1434, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Livingston 1st Lord Livingston родился около 1410 г. в местности фалкирк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Livingstone of Callendar было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Dauphine Dundas, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Berwick 14 мая 1434 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1467 г. в местности килсит, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет.
